Healthcare Our Services For Complete Healthcare Audiology Diagnosis and management of hearing and balance disorders. We offer hearing tests, hearing aid solutions, and rehabilitation services. Cardiology Comprehensive care for heart-related conditions. From diagnostics to preventive cardiology and treatment of cardiac diseases. Dermatology & Cosmetology Expert care for skin, hair, and nail concerns. Advanced treatments for medical and cosmetic dermatology needs. Endocrinology Management of diabetes, thyroid, and metabolic conditions. Helping maintain hormonal balance and overall wellness. Gastroenterology Diagnosis and treatment of digestive system disorders. Care for liver, stomach, and intestinal conditions. General Surgery Expert surgical care using modern techniques. Covers a wide range of routine and complex procedures. Interventional Radiology Used for diagnosis and treatment without major surgery. General Medicine Comprehensive care for adult health concerns. Diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of common illnesses. Nephrology Specialized care for kidney-related conditions. Management of chronic kidney disease and dialysis services. Ortho Surgery Treatment of bone, joint, and musculoskeletal issues. Includes trauma care, joint replacements, and sports injuries. Plastic Surgery Reconstructive and cosmetic surgical procedures. Restoring function and enhancing appearance. Radiology & Imaging Advanced diagnostic imaging services. Includes X-ray, ultrasound, CT scan, and more. Why Choose Us Cardinal Gracias Memorial Hospital Comprehensive  Care Affordable & Charitable Trusted Expertise Community Commitment Facilities & Features Cardinal Gracias Memorial Hospital IPF Scheme Blood Banks Free Charity OPD Services NABL (Accredited Pathology Laboratory) Hospitals Ambulance Services Suggestions & Feedback Testimonial What Patients Say About Us Real stories from real patients who have experienced our care and commitment. Modern equipments well trained and polite staff. My mother's both knee replacement surgeries done successfully. Cleaning is excellent. Mary Chettiar I recommend to choose this hospital for the medical care because Dr's are good , Nurses are caring and treatment is good Our Prosses How it Works?
